title: Use Insights, Grades and Reflect to check how learners are doing
staff_situations: How do I use Insights, Grades and Reflect to check how learners are doing?
underlying_needs: Insights — a built-in Teams dashboard — shows patterns in engagement, completion and grades across a whole group, not just from individual conversations
Reflect — a private check-in tool built into Teams — lets learners share how they're doing without needing to say it out loud in front of peers
Early patterns that point to where a closer look, or a check-in with a learner, might help

accessibility: Reflect check-ins let a learner who finds speaking up difficult share how they're doing privately and without pressure
inclusive_practice: Insights shows patterns across the whole group, rather than singling out one learner
Reflect gives every learner an equal, private way to communicate, not just those confident enough to say it out loud
trauma_informed: Reflect means a learner doesn't have to say how they're feeling in front of peers

framework_alignment: Digital Skills Framework: learner analytics and check-ins
